Task.Name: Project Trinity
Phase 1 - Initialization
1.1 Project Setup and Governance
Appoint AlphaX Programme Leads (Bosch and NewCo)
Establish AlphaX Steering Committee
Define RACI and Governance Model
Set Up PMO Tools and SharePoint Collaboration Site
Onboard KPMG PMO Team
Signing - Frozen Zone Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + NewCo Executive | No Battery IT production changes without SteerCo approval from this date

Task.Name: 1.2 Battery IT Landscape Assessment - 35 Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + KPMG | 35 Battery sites: EMEA ~15 / AP ~12 / AM ~8

Task.Name: Battery IT Inventory Request (Apps / Infrastructure / Devices)
Location List - 35 Battery Sites (EMEA / AP / AM)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Facilities | EMEA ~15 sites; AP ~12 sites; AM ~8 sites

Task.Name: Legal Entity Identification - NewCo Battery Registration
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance | NewCo legal entity registration critical; watch for Mexico and China delays

Task.Name: Identify Battery IT Dependencies on Bosch Shared Services
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects | Identifies all Bosch shared services used by Battery; forms full TSA scope

Task.Name: 1.3 Project Charter and Scope Definition
Draft AlphaX Project Charter
Define Scope Boundaries - Battery IT Only (Stand Alone)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + Bosch IT | 3000 employees; ~2500 client devices; ~200 apps; Full Stand Alone - no Merger Zone

Task.Name: Guiding Principles Workshop - First Make It Work
TSA Framework Preliminary Scope (Bosch-operated TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + IT PM | Bosch operates all Battery IT during TSA until Dec 2027; define scope and exit dates

Task.Name: Project Charter Approval
QG1 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Charter approved; full inventory confirmed; governance accepted; proceed to Concept Phase

Task.Name: Phase 2 - Concept
2.1 Detailed As-Is Analysis
Application Landscape Inventory (LeanIX) ~200 Battery Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects + KPMG | Battery-specific apps only; flag Bosch shared platform dependencies

Task.Name: IT Infrastructure As-Is Mapping - 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra Team | Site surveys for top 10 locations; EMEA and AP hubs prioritised

Task.Name: ERP Landscape Analysis - Battery SAP Scope
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP Team + KPMG | Identify Battery-specific vs shared Bosch SAP systems; scope separation complexity

Task.Name: Data Ownership and Separation Rules
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + Legal | Define data classification; confirm non-selective migration approach

Task.Name: Contract and Licence Inventory (~200 App Licences)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement + IT | Change of control clause review; FOSS compliance audit; ~2500 device licences

Task.Name: HR IT Systems Mapping - 3000 Battery Employees
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch HR IT | Country-by-country HR rules; payroll separation per region

Task.Name: OT and Production IT Assessment - Battery Manufacturing
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch OT + Production IT | Battery OT systems; MES; safety certifications; ICS/SCADA

Task.Name: Country-Specific IT Requirements (Germany / China / India / Mexico)
Task.Notes: Resources: Regional IT Leads | Germany works council; China PIPL; India RBIN waiver needed; Mexico SAT delays

Task.Name: 2.2 NewCo Stand-Alone Architecture Design
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects + KPMG | Stand Alone model - no Merger Zone; direct to NewCo environment

Task.Name: NewCo Architecture Concept Workshop (Stand Alone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + NewCo Architects | Confirm Stand Alone approach; no Merger Zone; define NewCo IT target state

Task.Name: WAN and LAN Architecture Design - 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra + KPMG | Hub-and-spoke model; 1 regional co-lo; 4-6 month WAN lead time; order at QG2

Task.Name: Active Directory Design - NewCo Battery Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch AD Team | New AD forest for NewCo Battery; fully separate from Bosch corporate AD

Task.Name: M365 and Azure Tenant Design - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team | New M365 tenant for NewCo; 3000 mailboxes; OneDrive and Teams in scope

Task.Name: Co-Location and Data Centre Selection (1 Regional Hub)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement + IT | Single regional co-locator; decision required by QG2; EMEA primary recommended

Task.Name: Security Architecture Design - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CISO | NewCo security architecture; independent from Bosch SOC post-Day 1

Task.Name: IAM and IdM Architecture Design - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IAM Team | New IAM platform for NewCo; decouple from Bosch IAM / Saviynt

Task.Name: 2.3 Battery IT Migration Strategy
ERP Migration Strategy Decision - Shell Copy vs Greenfield
Task.Notes: Resources: ERP Architects + KPMG | Decision must be made at QG2; shell copy benchmarked at 9-12 month SIT cycle

Task.Name: Application Categorisation and Wave Planning (~200 Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + WS Leads | Wave 1 ~60 critical; Wave 2 ~80 standard; Wave 3 ~60 local and OT apps

Task.Name: Data Separation Rules Finalised
TSA Service Catalogue Definition (Bosch-provided Services)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + NewCo IT | Catalogue all Bosch services Battery NewCo requires; define exit criteria per service line

Task.Name: NewCo Stand-Alone Operating Model (post-TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects | Stand Alone: all services exit directly to NewCo; define NewCo IT operating model

Task.Name: 2.4 Client Device and Workplace Strategy
Client Device Inventory (~2500 Battery Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Asset Mgmt | Identify device age and type; replacement hardware plan for out-of-support devices

Task.Name: Client Migration Approach - Wave-Based Reimaging
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP Team | ~2500 devices across 35 sites; EMEA first then AP then AM

Task.Name: 2.5 Planning and Baseline
Detailed Project Plan Development
Risk Register Baseline
OPL Establishment and Tracking Setup
Resource Plan and Budget Baseline
QG2 - Concept Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Architecture approved; ERP strategy decided; WAN vendor contracted; TSA catalogue signed off; proceed to Development

Task.Name: Phase 3 - Development and Build
3.1 NewCo IT Infrastructure Build
WAN Provider Selection and Ordering - 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement | Order immediately after QG2; 4-6 month lead time; covers all 35 Battery sites

Task.Name: Co-Location Data Centre Procurement - 1 Regional Hub
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | Primary EMEA co-locator for NewCo DC; connectivity to AP and AM

Task.Name: Active Directory Build - NewCo Battery Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch AD Team | Foundation: all 3000 users and ~200 applications migrate to this new AD forest

Task.Name: WAN Delivery and Testing - EMEA Battery Sites (~15 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Provider + Bosch Infra | 4-6 month lead time from Dec 2026 order; EMEA circuit activation April 2027 onwards

Task.Name: WAN Delivery and Testing - AP Battery Sites (~12 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Provider + Bosch Infra | China requires local provider; stagger by country

Task.Name: WAN Delivery and Testing - AM Battery Sites (~8 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Provider + Bosch Infra | Mexico legal entity confirmed before ordering; CSD leads required

Task.Name: LAN and WiFi Setup - Top 15 Priority Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | Remaining 20 sites use existing Bosch LAN under TSA until cutover

Task.Name: Server Infrastructure Build - NewCo Co-Lo DC
M365 Tenant Provisioning - NewCo Battery (3000 Mailboxes)
Azure and Cloud Environment Setup - NewCo Battery
Telephony Design and Platform Setup - NewCo Battery 35 Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Telecom | Phone number porting plan; 4-8 weeks per operator per site; state-owned operators longer

Task.Name: File Share Infrastructure - NewCo (NAS / Cloud)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | User documents and shared drives for ~3000 Battery employees

Task.Name: Backup and Archiving Setup - NewCo Battery
3.2 ERP and SAP Development - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP Team + Migration Partner

Task.Name: SAP System Landscape Analysis - Battery Scope
SAP Shell Copy Preparation - Battery Systems (NewCo)
Task.Notes: Resources: Migration Partner + Bosch SAP | Shell copy approach confirmed; Battery-specific systems only; disconnect from Bosch SAP

Task.Name: SAP Interface Identification and Adaptation Plan
SAP Authorisation Concept - Disconnect from Bosch IdM
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch SAP Security | Battery user authorisations must be fully decoupled from Bosch IAM and Saviynt

Task.Name: BW and Reporting Setup - NewCo Battery
EDI and Integration Setup - NewCo Battery
ERP Test Environment Setup (SIT and UAT) - NewCo
3.3 Application Migration Preparation (~200 Battery Apps)
Application Inventory Finalisation (~200 Battery Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + Bosch IT | Validate LeanIX entries; add local and regional apps discovered post-QG2

Task.Name: Application Grouping into Migration Waves
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + WS Leads | Wave 1 ~60 critical; Wave 2 ~80 standard; Wave 3 ~60 local and OT

Task.Name: Migration Package Development per Wave
Custom Application Adaptation for NewCo Environment
Task.Notes: Resources: Dev Teams | Re-point app configs from Bosch to NewCo domain / AD / M365 / ITSM

Task.Name: Integration Development (APIs and Interfaces) - NewCo
3.4 Client Workplace - 2500 Device Migration Preparation
Client Software Management Setup (SCCM / Intune) - NewCo
Device Reimaging Standard and Packaging (~2500 Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP | Standard image for NewCo domain; hardware refresh for out-of-support devices

Task.Name: Regional Wave Plan - Client Migration (EMEA / AP / AM)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP + IT PM | EMEA Wave 1; AP Wave 2; AM Wave 3; stagger by site count and regional complexity

Task.Name: User Profile and OneDrive Migration Tooling Setup
3.5 Security and IAM - NewCo Battery
IAM Platform Deployment - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IAM | New IAM platform independent of Bosch Saviynt; provisioning for 3000 Battery users

Task.Name: IT Security Concept Finalisation (incl. ISO 27001 Baseline)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CISO | NewCo CISO appointed; ISO 27001 pre-assessment; BCM and GDPR compliance

Task.Name: OT Security Assessment and Remediation - Battery Manufacturing
Task.Notes: Resources: OT Security Team | Battery plant OT systems; ICS/SCADA assessment; safety certification review

Task.Name: CMDB Setup (ServiceNow or ITSM Platform) - 2500 NewCo Assets
3.6 NewCo IT Organisation and Operations Setup
NewCo IT Target Operating Model (TOM)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch HR + IT | NewCo IT org structure; Regional IT leads for EMEA / AP / AM

Task.Name: MSP and ITO Contracting - Field Support 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement | On-site support for AP and AM Battery sites; multi-language support required

Task.Name: ITSM and ServiceNow Configuration - NewCo Battery
Help Desk Setup and Staffing - Multi-Region NewCo
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Ops | Multilingual support for EMEA / AP / AM Battery users; 24x5 coverage

Task.Name: 3.7 TSA Framework Finalisation (Bosch-provided Services)
TSA Service Descriptions Finalised - All 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + NewCo IT | Each TSA service line must have an exit date and acceptance criteria

Task.Name: TSA SLA and KPI Framework
TSA Governance Model (Monthly SteerCo Reviews)
TSA Contracts Legal Review and Finalisation
QG3 - Development Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | NewCo infra ready; ERP built; app packages ready; 2500 devices packaged; TSA contracts signed; proceed to Implementation

Task.Name: Phase 4 - Implementation
4.1 Infrastructure Cutover - 35 Battery Sites to NewCo
WAN Cutover - EMEA Battery Sites Batch 1 (~8 sites)
WAN Cutover - AP Battery Sites Batch 1 (Major Hubs ~6 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Team + Bosch Infra | AP hub sites first

Task.Name: WAN Cutover - AM Battery Sites Batch 1 (Major Hubs ~4 sites)
WAN Cutover - EMEA Battery Sites Batch 2 (Remaining ~7)
WAN Cutover - AP Battery Sites Batch 2 (Remaining ~6)
WAN Cutover - AM Battery Sites Batch 2 (Remaining ~4)
File Share Migration to NewCo (~3000 Battery Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | User documents and shared drives migration to NewCo environment

Task.Name: Telephony Cutover to NewCo - 35 Battery Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Telecom | Staggered by operator; parallel execution across sites; 4-8 weeks per operator

Task.Name: 4.2 Client Device Migration - 2500 Battery Devices
Client Migration Wave 1 - EMEA Battery Hub Sites (~500 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: EMEA IT Team | EMEA hub sites first; ~500 devices

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 2 - AP Battery Sites (~700 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: AP IT Team | ~700 AP devices; run parallel with EMEA Wave 1

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 3 - EMEA Remaining Sites (~300 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: EMEA IT Team | ~300 remaining EMEA devices

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 4 - AM Battery Sites (~500 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: AM IT Team | ~500 AM devices

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 5 - AP Remaining + AM Remaining (~400)
Task.Notes: Resources: CWP Team | ~400 devices to complete all regions

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 6 - Stragglers and Exceptions (~100)
Task.Notes: Resources: CWP Team | ~100 devices; special handling; exceptions and replacements

Task.Name: Email and M365 Mailbox Migration (3000 Battery Mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team | Migrate in batches aligned with client device waves

Task.Name: OneDrive and User Document Migration
4.3 ERP Migration to NewCo Battery
SAP Shell Copy Execution - Test Run (NewCo Battery)
SAP System Integration Test 1 (SIT1) - Battery
SAP Shell Copy Execution - Production Preparation
SAP System Integration Test 2 (SIT2) - Battery
Business User Acceptance Testing (UAT) - Battery ERP
UAT Sign-Off
4.4 Application Migration to NewCo Battery
Wave 1 Application Migration - Critical Battery Apps (~60)
Wave 2 Application Migration - Standard Apps (~80)
Wave 3 Application Migration - Local and OT Apps (~60)
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams | Regional and OT-linked apps; some may require TSA extension if not Day 1 ready

Task.Name: End-to-End Integration Testing - NewCo Battery
Regression Testing Sign-Off
4.5 Day 1 Cutover Preparation
Cutover Plan Finalisation
End-User Communication Plan (3000 Battery Users / 35 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + Regional IT | Multi-language; EMEA + AP + AM; Battery users only

Task.Name: Dress Rehearsal and Cutover Simulation
Help Desk 24x7 Activation and Training - NewCo Battery
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | Multi-region time zone coverage for Battery users

Task.Name: Go No-Go Readiness Assessment
QG4 - Implementation Quality Gate - Go / No-Go
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | 2500 clients migrated; ERP live in NewCo; apps live in NewCo; UAT passed; cutover plan approved; Day 1 confirmed

Task.Name: Phase 5 - GoLive and Programme Closure
5.1 Day 1 GoLive Activities
Day 1 - NewCo Battery IT GoLive (Legal Separation Effective)
Task.Notes: Resources: Executive Leadership | Battery IT fully separated from Bosch; NewCo IT independent from this date

Task.Name: Network Domain Cutover to NewCo Active Directory
ERP Day 1 Go-Live Activation - Battery SAP NewCo
Application Day 1 Activation - All Battery Regions
Bosch TSA Residual Services Activated (Minimal Scope)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + NewCo IT | TSA clock starts 01 Oct 2027; expires 31 Dec 2027; only residual services below full separation threshold

Task.Name: User Go-Live Communication (3000 Battery Users)
Help Desk 24x7 Live - NewCo Battery
5.2 Hypercare - 65 Working Days
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads + IT Ops

Task.Name: Daily Operations Review Meetings (Regional Standups)
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Regional WS Leads | EMEA + AP + AM standup cadence; Battery NewCo focus

Task.Name: Incident Management and P1/P2 Issue Resolution
Performance Monitoring and TSA SLA Tracking
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | Bosch residual TSA SLA compliance tracked from Day 1; exit by Dec 2027

Task.Name: Issue Backlog Management and Prioritisation
Hypercare Close - Formal Sign-Off
5.3 TSA Exit and Bosch Service Termination
TSA Exit Planning per Service
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Bosch IT | Define exit criteria per remaining TSA service; agree acceptance tests

Task.Name: TSA Service Exit Wave 1 - Infrastructure Services
TSA Service Exit Wave 2 - Application and ERP Services
TSA Exit Confirmation (All Bosch Services Terminated)
5.4 Programme Closure
Lessons Learned Workshop (All Regions)
Programme Closure Report
Final Programme Sign-Off
QG5 - Programme Closure Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare stable; TSA fully exited; NewCo IT fully independent; AlphaX programme formally closed
